prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年辽宁大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约31374名→31849名→42216名→40636名→43942名，整体呈明显后移趋势，近3年累计后移约12000名；202 5年基准位次约43942名，为近5年最高（数字最大），反映竞争持续加剧；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年29人、2022年24人、2023年24人、2024年33人、2 025年33人；2026年计划为31人，较2025年减少2人，小幅缩招约6.1%，缩招通常使位次前移（数字减小），但需结合其他因素综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年排名在124–131名之间波动，整体处于中后段211水平；该校在2021–2026年声誉舆情文件 中均未出现，说明近年无重大正面或负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度总排名第105位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光度较低；2021–2025年投档异常文件中亦无该校记录，表明在浙 江录取走势平稳，未出现断档或暴跌；第五轮学科评估中，辽宁大学仅应用经济学获评A-，其余学科未进入A类；A-及以上学科仅1个，优势学科集中度较低，对 整体报考热度的拉动作用有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在浙江招生专业涵盖法学、经济学类、金融学类、计算机类等，其中法学、计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热 度偏热至高热推荐，但经管类专业呈分化观望；浙江省2026年考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人大幅增长约37.5%，即使按历史综合类占比估算，竞争压力显 著加剧，是推高位次数字的最主要因素；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，与浙江省地理距离较远；该校在浙江招生人数占比 较小（2025年约33人），属跨省招生，地域偏好对浙江考生报考意愿影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次43942名、2026年缩招2人（位次前移约1600名效应）与浙江 省考生总数大幅增长约37.5%（竞争加剧，位次后移效应）两大核心矛盾，考生规模激增的竞争压力显著超过缩招带来的位次前移效应；加之学校声誉平稳、优势学科集中度低、 抖音热度一般，缺乏额外吸引力。因此，小幅上调200名，预测2026年最低录取位次约42543名，区间42043–43043名。

- 数据科学与大数据技术（崇山校区）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约42543名，区间42043–43043名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力（计算机类、数据科学等热度高且位次适中），一档专业（法学、经济学类、金融学类）作 为冲刺，三档专业（数学、测控、工程管理）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（42043名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（43043名附近）建议以二档稳专业 为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Liaoning University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 31,374 → 31,849 → 42,216 → 40,636 → 43,942, showing a clear backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12,000 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 43,942, the highest (largest number) in the past 5 years, reflecting intensifying competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category was 29 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 33 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 31, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 6.1%, which typically causes rankings to move forward (smaller number), but needs to be considered together with other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking for 2026 is about 125th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 124–131, overall at the mid-to-lower level of 211 universities; the university did not appear in reputation and public opinion documents from 2021–2026, indicating no major positive or negative public incidents in recent years; its Douyin school popularity overall ranking is 105th, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms; there is also no record of the university in the 2021–2025 application anomaly files, indicating stable admission trends in Zhejiang without gaps or sharp drops; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Liaoning University only had Applied Economics rated A-, with no other disciplines entering the A category; only 1 discipline is A- or above, with low concentration of advantageous disciplines, limiting its pull on overall application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university's majors enrolling in Zhejiang include Law, Economics, Finance, Computer Science, etc., among which Law, Computer Science, and Electronic Information/Communication are socially hot to highly recommended, while economics and management majors show divergence and wait-and-see; the total number of examinees in Zhejiang Province for 2026 is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.5% from 290,000 in 2025, even when estimated by historical comprehensive category proportion, competition pressure intensifies markedly, which is the main factor pushing the ranking number higher; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, geographically far from Zhejiang Province; its enrollment number in Zhejiang is relatively small (about 33 in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with neutral impact on Zhejiang examinees' willingness to apply due to geographical preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two core contradictions of the 2025 baseline ranking of 43,942, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 2 (ranking forward effect of about 1,600 places) and the significant increase of about 37.5% in the total number of examinees in Zhejiang Province (intensified competition, ranking backward effect), the competitive pressure from the surge in examinee numbers significantly exceeds the ranking forward effect from enrollment reduction; coupled with stable university reputation, low concentration of advantageous disciplines, and average Douyin popularity, there is a lack of additional appeal. Therefore, a slight upward adjustment of 200 places is made, predicting the 2026 minimum admission ranking to be about 42,543, with a range of 42,043–43,043.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 42,543, range 42,043–43,043. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Data Science, etc., which are hot with moderate rankings), use Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics, Finance) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Mathematics, Measurement and Control, Engineering Management) as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 42,043), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; for rankings near the upper bound of the range (around 43,043), it is recommended to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors.
